signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Extension Advances in Principle Amid Denials | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Extension Advances in Principle Amid Denials | NO | MED confidence**  
Mediators report progress toward extending the two-week US-Iran ceasefire expiring April 22, with an "in principle agreement" from both sides to allow more diplomacy on nuclear issues, Strait of Hormuz, and damages, though a senior US official and White House deny any formal extension[1][3][5].
